message:
chore: update Cargo.lock dependencies + beads tracking

Cargo.lock updated with dependency version bumps (asupersync,
franken-* crates 0.2.5 → 0.2.6 and related transitive deps).

Beads tracking: new closed issue for limit=0 pagination edge case
fix (empty result set was returning 500 instead of empty page).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
